brand_voice: Confident, aspirational, sun-soaked luxury — the brand speaks like a premium lifestyle magazine come to life
brand_statement: HIPPO FLOAT exists at the intersection of effortless luxury and the perfect summer day. We don't sell floats — we sell the feeling of having arrived.
brand_promise: Every float is a first-class seat in the most beautiful place on earth

psychographics: Travels to Ibiza, Mykonos, Tulum, Bali

typography_style.headline: Bold serif or high-contrast sans — think Vogue, not startup
typography_style.body: Clean, airy — generous line height, confident spacing
typography_style.hierarchy: Headlines dominate, body whispers, product name anchors

photography_style.lighting: Golden hour magic — warm, directional, cinematic. Never flat, never harsh flash
photography_style.composition: Rule of thirds, negative space, leading lines toward the float
photography_style.models: Sun-kissed, effortlessly glamorous — looks like they live there, not posing
photography_style.environment: Crystal-clear water required — teal, turquoise, Mediterranean blue
photography_style.mood: You're supposed to be there right now — immediate aspiration, zero friction
photography_style.color_grade: Warm highlights, cool midtones, rich shadows — editorial not Instagram filter
photography_style.skin_tones: Sun-kissed, glowing, diverse but unified by lifestyle
photography_style.wardrobe: Minimal luxury — designer swimwear, no logos competing with HIPPO FLOAT

video_style.pacing: Slow reveal builds to confident cut — Mediterranean rhythm
video_style.cuts: Motivated cuts on music, never random
video_style.music_mood: Deep house, ambient electronic, or cinematic orchestral — never pop
video_style.camera_movement: Smooth drone, slow push-in, gentle pan — always intentional
video_style.edit_style: Premium commercial — every frame could be a print ad

approved_environments: Infinity pool at luxury resort (Bali, Mykonos, Santorini)
Mediterranean sea — crystal clear turquoise water
Private villa pool — white stone, minimal architecture
Miami Beach — Art Deco luxury hotel pool
Tulum — cenote or infinity pool with jungle

hero_lines: This is what summer feels like
The ocean is your living room

instagram.caption_style: 1-2 sentences max on first line, then line breaks, emojis sparingly and only premium ones (🌊 ☀️ 💛 🤍)
instagram.hashtag_strategy: 5-10 targeted hashtags in comment or below fold

tiktok.caption_style: Hook in first 3 words, conversational, trend-aware but premium

language_support.note: Product targets global luxury market with strong Israeli customer base
